zh.lifeSummary: 當Princess Sofie von Austria於1088年出生在奧地利維恩時，她的父親Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich36歲，母親Ida Markgräfin von Österreich35歲。她於1128年與Count Sieghard Burghausen結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1154年5月2日享年66歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Austria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Virgilio, Ramon, Roberto, Alfredo, Eduardo, Jaime, Jesus, Almario, Amado, Anastacio, Angelito, Arsenio.
Hispanic (mainly Philippines): from the name of the European country, either as an ethnic name or with a reference to the Austrian Habsburg dynasty which ruled Spain in the 16th and 17th centuries.
Possibly also an Americanized form of German Österreich ‘Austria’.

nameMeanings.name: Sofie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sophie
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Princess Sofie von Austria was born in 1088, in Vienna, Austria, her father, Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich, was 36 and her mother, Ida Markgräfin von Österreich, was 35. She married Count Sieghard Burghausen in 1128. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 2 May 1154, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Princess Sofie von Austria est née en 1088, à Vienne, Autriche, son père, Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Ida Markgräfin von Österreich, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Count Sieghard Burghausen en 1128. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 mai 1154, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Princess Sofie von Austria 1088 in Wien, Österreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich 36 und ihre Mutter Ida Markgräfin von Österreich 35. Sie hat 1128 Count Sieghard Burghausen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. Mai 1154 im Alter von 66 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Princess Sofie von Austria è nata il nel 1088 nel Wien, Austria, sua padre, Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Ida Markgräfin von Österreich, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Count Sieghard Burghausen nel 1128. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 2 maggio 1154, all'età di 66 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Princess Sofie von Austria(이)가 1088년 오스트리아 빈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ida Markgräfin von Österreich(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1128년 Count Sieghard Burghausen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1154년 5월 2일 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Ida Markgräfin von Österreich, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Count Sieghard Burghausen em 1128. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Princess Sofie von Austria родилась в 1088 г. в местности Вена, Австрия, её отцу по имени Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Ida Markgräfin von Österreich, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Count Sieghard Burghausen в 1128 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 2 мая 1154 г. в возрасте 66 лет.
